scripts.check: tsc --noEmit && svelte-check --tsconfig ./tsconfig.json && vitest run && playwright test && biome check
scripts.ci-check: tsc --noEmit & svelte-check --tsconfig ./tsconfig.json & vitest run & playwright test & biome check; wait
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run storybook:build && rm -rf dist/storybook && cp -r storybook-static dist/storybook && touch dist/.nojekyll && TMPDIR=$(mktemp -d) && cp -r dist/* dist/.nojekyll "$TMPDIR/" && cd "$TMPDIR" && git init && git checkout -b gh-pages && git add -A && git commit -m "Deploy $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)" && git remote add origin git@github.com:RubaXa/real-life-grind.git && git push origin gh-pages --force && rm -rf "$TMPDIR"
scripts.deploy:app: npm run build && touch dist/.nojekyll && TMPDIR=$(mktemp -d) && cp -r dist/* dist/.nojekyll "$TMPDIR/" && cd "$TMPDIR" && git init && git checkout -b gh-pages && git add -A && git commit -m "Deploy app $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)" && git remote add origin git@github.com:RubaXa/real-life-grind.git && git push origin gh-pages --force && rm -rf "$TMPDIR"
scripts.deploy:storybook: npm run storybook:build && mkdir -p dist-storybook/storybook && cp -r storybook-static/* dist-storybook/storybook/ && touch dist-storybook/.nojekyll && TMPDIR=$(mktemp -d) && cp -r dist-storybook/* dist-storybook/.nojekyll "$TMPDIR/" && cd "$TMPDIR" && git init && git checkout -b gh-pages && git add -A && git commit -m "Deploy storybook $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)" && git remote add origin git@github.com:RubaXa/real-life-grind.git && git push origin gh-pages --force && rm -rf "$TMPDIR" dist-storybook
